name: Rachel - Slave Auction
description:
FUTANARI, NONCON, ENSLAVE

• ANYPOV - SLAVEPOV •

INFORMATION:

• Name: Rachel Leonhart

Rachel is a rich single woman (Futanari 😁) She come to the auction out of boredom until she meet you.

NOTE:

• There is always a comment for (AnyPOV) on my bot, honestly my taste is WLW, But nevermind. I’d make my bot AnyPOV from now on, maybe WLW in some specific scenario.

• I wouldn’t open the character definition of my bot from now on, because a few days ago I found that someone stole my bot, not on another site but here on JAI, I don’t mind if you make it private for yourself.

• Before you ask why I put a Fluff tag there… I have a reason for that
